elements.description: ทางเดิน (corridor), floor level box '1 +0.30 1'
stair flight, floor-1 plan view, steps numbered 1 through 13 (11 visible treads shown 1-11 plus landing steps 12,13 near the top)
ลง (down) and ขึ้น (up) direction arrows on the stair flight
circled '1' at right side, referencing a stair section view (not present on this page -- may be on a subsequent sheet)
triangle callouts '1'/'2' around the room perimeter, plus a door swing near โถง

warnings: IMPORTANT cross-discipline naming note: this architecture sheet labels the stair 'ST.3', but based on step count (~13 visible here + continuing to 17 on the floor-2 plan, matching the structural stair's combined floor1-landing-floor2 rise of 12+6=18 steps) this is very likely the SAME PHYSICAL main interior stair documented on structural sheets S-11 (ST2, ระดับชั้น1-ชานพัก) and S-12 (ST2, ระดับชานพัก-พื้นชั้น2). The architecture drawing set's naming (ST.3) does not match the structural set's naming (ST2) for what appears to be the same stair -- flagged for human reconciliation, not merged or renamed here.

This sheet has no section view printed (unlike A-16/17/18/19/20 which each had a plan+section pair) -- only plan views for floor 1 and floor 2. No _section.json file was created for this sheet since none exists on the source page.
One of 2 views on this page; sibling is the floor-2 plan view _view2_st3_floor2_plan.json.
